title: Register permanent first admin with hardcoded email and password

requirements.summary: Pre-fill admin login email and trigger auto-seeding of hardcoded admin credentials on page load
acceptanceCriteria: The AdminLoginPage pre-fills the email input with 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' on initial render.
When no admin exists yet, the first-admin seed is triggered automatically on page load.
After seeding, logging in with email 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' and password 'Munnu1998@' succeeds and redirects to the admin dashboard.
No manual registration step is required for this admin account.

file_operations.description: Pre-fill the email input field with 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' on component mount. Add useEffect logic that calls the useAdminExists hook on page load; if no admin exists, automatically invoke the seedFirstAdmin mutation from useAdminRegistration to create the hardcoded admin account with email 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' and SHA-256 hashed password 'Munnu1998@'. Ensure the seeding is idempotent and does not interfere with existing login flows. Show a loading or seeding indicator while the operation is in progress.

Ensure the seedFirstAdmin mutation hook correctly hashes the password 'Munnu1998@' using SHA-256 before calling the backend's inviteAdminUser method with email 'magic.nellorehub@gmail.com' and the hashed password. Verify that the mutation handles success and error states appropriately, and that it can be safely called multiple times without creating duplicate entries (idempotency is enforced by the backend).
